column4: Use delivery list headers as the source of truth for bay routing.
TEMPERED headers route to blue bays 12-16.
MIRROR, BFS MIRROR, and ANNEALED headers route to Mirror/BFS mirror bays.
Red bays 1-11 are Coral right now and are not used by our automation.
Yellow/light blue middle bays are ignored for Indian Trail glass automation in v1.
Receiving decides oversized manually based on size and weight.
Do not auto-assign oversized material in v1.
Reference only; not an automatic rule yet.
Reference only; not an automatic rule yet.
If no valid bay exists, create/show manual exception instead of guessing.
Assume one bay per order in v1.
Rare large orders can be manually split into another bay later.
Morning clearing uses a map/walkaround form, not a clear-all button.
SDI warning popup only fires when scanned at Indian Trail.
